GTM decision: the offer is B2B workflow automation platform. The market is Mid-market SaaS operations teams.

For the GB motion, geographies include United Kingdom and Ireland. We will prioritize industries include Software and Professional services; company size is 1000+.

Buying roles: titles include Marketing Operations Director and Revenue Operations Manager. Functions include Sales, Marketing, and Operations; seniorities are VP and Director.

Demand capture will use search terms include revenue operations and workflow automation. The problems are slow lead follow-up and manual handoffs; triggers include pipeline conversion pressure and CRM migration.

The campaign goal is Trial demand. Preferred channels include google-ads-youtube, linkedin-ads, and microsoft-ads.
